privateNameTaggedTemplate.tlua(5,23): error TS2304: Cannot find name 'y'.

privateNameTaggedTemplate.tlua(5,34): error TS1135: Argument expression expected.
privateNameTaggedTemplate.tlua(5,36): error TS2304: Cannot find name 'x'.
privateNameTaggedTemplate.tlua(5,37): error TS1005: ',' expected.
privateNameTaggedTemplate.tlua(5,38): error TS2352: Conversion of type 'number' to type '() => any' may be a mistake because neither type sufficiently overlaps with the other. If this was intentional, convert the expression to 'unknown' first.
privateNameTaggedTemplate.tlua(5,40): error TS1139: Type parameter declaration expected.
privateNameTaggedTemplate.tlua(5,41): error TS100028: An arithmetic operand must be of type 'any' or 'number'.
privateNameTaggedTemplate.tlua(8,1): error TS1160: Unterminated template literal.


==== privateNameTaggedTemplate.tlua (22 errors) ====
    class Foo {
    ~~~~~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
          ~~~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
          ~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'Foo'.
      #x = 3;
       ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'x'.
         ~
!!! error TS1005: ';' expected.
      #y = null as any;
       ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'y'.
         ~
!!! error TS1005: ';' expected.
      func() {
      ~~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'func'.
             ~
!!! error TS1005: ';' expected.
        console.log(this.#y`->>${this.#x}<<-`);
        ~~~~~~~
!!! error TS2584: Cannot find name 'console'. Do you need to change your target library? Try changing the 'lib' compiler option to include 'dom'.
                    ~~~~
!!! error TS1135: Argument expression expected.
                        ~
!!! error TS1135: Argument expression expected.
                          ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'y'.
                                 ~~~~
!!! error TS1109: Expression expected.
                                     ~
!!! error TS1135: Argument expression expected.
                                       ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'x'.
                                        ~
!!! error TS1005: ',' expected.
                                         ~~~~~~
                                           ~
!!! error TS1139: Type parameter declaration expected.
                                            ~~~
      }
    ~~~
    ~~~
    }
    ~
    ~
    
    
!!! error TS2352: Conversion of type 'number' to type '() => any' may be a mistake because neither type sufficiently overlaps with the other. If this was intentional, convert the expression to 'unknown' first.
    
!!! error TS100028: An arithmetic operand must be of type 'any' or 'number'.
    
!!! error TS1160: Unterminated template literal.
